title: Raging Moderates LIVE w/ Scott Galloway & Jessica Tarlov
summary:
Join Scott Galloway (@TheProfGPod) and Jessica Tarlov for a livestream of Monday's episode of Raging Moderates. Scott and Jessica will take on the biggest news and politics stories at the start of the week — and you'll get the latest as it happens.
